response: Hey everyone, I'm Casey! I'm pretty outgoing and love trying new things, so I'll definitely be speaking up a lot during our discussions. I approach group situations by keeping an open mind but I'm not afraid to call out anything that seems off to me.

Hey everyone, I'm Gray. I'm pretty methodical and like to think things through carefully, so I'll be paying close attention to what everyone says and trying to keep the discussion focused and logical. I tend to trust people at first, but I'm not afraid to speak up if something doesn't add up.

Hey everyone, I'm Logan! I'm pretty outgoing and like to keep things moving—I'd rather talk things out loud and fast than sit around overthinking everything. If something feels off, you can bet I'll be the first one to call it out.

Hi, I'm Alex. I like to keep a level head and stay methodical when working through problems, so I'll be weighing everyone's words carefully. I don't jump to conclusions easily, but I'll speak up when I see something that doesn't quite fit.

Hi everyone, I'm Harper. I tend to be very thoughtful and organized in group settings—I like listening carefully and weighing what everyone says before making up my mind. I'm naturally pretty trusting, but I'll definitely speak up if something doesn't sit right with me.

1. Casey seems like the biggest threat—she's outgoing, assertive, and already said she'll call things out. She could easily steer discussion against us.
